{/* Hero Section */}
Jimale Keyse Passionate Developer | Creative Innovator
{/* About Section */}

About Me

I'm a full-stack developer with a passion for creating impactful digital experiences. I specialize in building fast, scalable, and accessible web applications.

{/* Experience Section */}

Experience

Software Engineer Intern - XYZ Corp

Worked on building scalable APIs and internal tools, resulting in 25% time savings for operations teams.

Research Assistant - Audio ML Lab

Developed perceptual sound classifiers using PyTorch and clustered audio features from 5k+ samples.

{/* Projects Section */}

Projects

AI Audio Model Explorer

A web tool to explore general audio models by task and resource type. Built with React + Tailwind.

View Project

Crypto Market Predictor

Time-series model predicting crypto trends using LSTM and interactive Streamlit dashboard.

View Project
{/* Skills Section */}

Skills

JavaScript
React.js
Python
TensorFlow
SQL
Tailwind CSS
{/* I Like Building Section */}

I Like Building Things

Throughout my journey, I've actively participated in over 2 hackathons. These events challenge creative thinking and showcase the power of rapid prototyping. From audio AI tools to crypto analysis dashboards, I thrive in fast-paced environments where innovation takes center stage.

Whitman x GDSC Hackathon 2024

Developed a sound journal app that lets users reflect on seasons through personal audio and generative AI tools. Integrated Streamlit and custom perception models.

Hack the World

Created a React-based website that explored local food systems through storytelling and ambient audio. Used map integration and perceptual clustering.
